notes.title: Lorentz, Symmetries & Currents
notes.label: PS1.
notes.desc: SO(3), infinitesimal Lorentz, energy-momentum tensor (incl. EM field), Proca, scale invariance.

notes.title: Canonical Quantization & the Free Scalar
notes.label: PS2.
notes.desc: String quantization, free scalar, normal ordering, Yukawa, Wick's theorem, Feynman propagator.

notes.title: Dirac Field & Spin-Statistics
notes.label: PS3.
notes.desc: Clifford algebra, Lorentz from γ-matrices, traces, plane-wave spinors, canonical quantisation.

notes.title: Interactions & Tree-Level Amplitudes
notes.label: PS4.
notes.desc: Wick's theorem at tree level — φ⁴ 3-to-3, vacuum bubbles, Yukawa, Compton, e⁻e⁺ → μ⁻μ⁺.

notes.title: Correlation Functions in Quantum Mechanics
notes.label: Ψ1.
notes.desc: PSI QFT II PS1 — Euclidean / real-time path-integral propagators of the harmonic oscillator at finite temperature.

notes.title: Classical Field Theory
notes.label: I.
notes.desc: Schwartz, Ch. 1–3 — Euler–Lagrange, Noether, Green's functions.

notes.title: Second Quantization & LSZ Reduction

notes.title: Spin 1, Gauge Invariance, Photon Propagator
notes.label: III.

notes.title: Spinors, Dirac Equation, CPT
notes.label: IV.
notes.desc: Schwartz, Ch. 10–11 — Lorentz reps, Weyl/Majorana, charge conjugation, parity, time reversal.

notes.title: QED Tree Amplitudes

notes.desc: Schwartz, Ch. 13 — e+e− → μ+μ− and Rutherford scattering from the Feynman rules.

notes.title: Path Integrals (in QFT)
